description: Implement Lys (Lumen method), extended Trafo (transformer theory), and Magnet (magnetic circuit) solver modules for Opgavesamling coverage.
steps: 1. Add module translations for 'lys' and 'magnet' to T.da.modules, T.en.modules, T.fa.modules
2. Add 'lys' and 'magnet' to NAV_GROUPS 'theory' keys array
3. Add case statements for 'lys' and 'magnet' in renderModule switch
4. Implement Lys module with lumen method, point illuminance, room factor, utilization factor, luminaire count
5. Extend Trafo module with EMF equation, OC/SC tests, voltage regulation, efficiency, parallel operation, vector groups
6. Implement Magnet module with MMF, flux density, field strength, reluctance, air gap, Faraday induction, self-inductance, force, energy
7. All calculations must use calcDetail() for full step-by-step working
acceptance_criteria: All existing 1059 tests continue to pass
New tests pass for lys, trafo extensions, and magnet modules
All render functions return HTML with no <input type='text'> or <textarea>
All calculations use calcDetail() for showing full working
Lys module covers: point illuminance, lumen method, room factor, utilization factor, luminaire count
Trafo module covers: EMF, OC/SC tests, voltage regulation, efficiency, parallel operation, vector groups
Magnet module covers: MMF, B, H, reluctance, air gap, induction, inductance, force, energy
verification: node /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' should show increased passed count, 0 failed
